Computed by PubChem 2.2 (PubChem release 2025.04.14)

Dates

   Create: 2005-08-08 
   Modify: 2026-03-28 

Description

Urolithin A is a member of coumarins and a urolithin. It has a role as a geroprotector.

ChEBI

Urolithin A is a metabolite of ellagic acid. It has been demonstrated to stimulate mitophagy and improve muscle health in old animals and in preclinical models of aging.

results.title: Urolithin a 3-glucuronide | C19H16O10 | CID 102579638 - PubChem
results.content: Urolithin A 3-O-glucuronide is a member of the class of benzochromenones that is urolithin A in which the phenolic hydrogen at position 3 has been replaced
